---
title: AI War Cloud
subtitle: Battlefield to Desktop
date: Mar 20 2025
---

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | column: page
# | label: tbl-aiwartable
# | tbl-cap: "AI War Cloud Database: A collection of techno-military-industrial projects that use machine learning tasks."
## | tbl-colwidths: [3,1,3,3,3,3,1,5]


from IPython.display import display, HTML, Markdown
from tabulate import tabulate
import pandas as pd
from itables import show, options as opt, init_notebook_mode

init_notebook_mode()

df = pd.read_csv('data/aiwarcloud-table.csv', sep=',')

df = df.drop(['Source', 'URL', 'Reference', 'Link'], axis=1)  

data = df.head(43)
# systems = df.count

# options.buttons = [ 'copy', 'excel', 'pdf']
opt.paging = False
opt.scrollY="800px"
opt.scrollCollapse=True
opt.columnDefs=[{"width": "20%", "targets": [3,4,5]}, 
        {"className": "dt-body-left", "targets": [0,1,2,3,4,5,6]}] 
        #cell classes: https://datatables.net/manual/styling/classes#Cell-classes
opt.textAlign='left'
# opt.width='10%'
opt.autoWidth = True
# opt.classes = "cell"
opt.layout = {  'topEnd': 'search', 
                'topStart': 'paging',
                'bottomStart': 'info',
                'bottomEnd': 'pageLength' }
# opt.lengthMenu = [20,50,100]
# opt.column_filters = 'header'

show(data, classes="display wrap compact")

```


<!-- ```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Systems"
#| icon: pencil
#| color: primary

dict(
    value = systems
)

``` -->

<!-- MARKDOWN TABLE VERSION -->
<!-- ```{python}
#| echo: false
#| column: page
#| label: tbl-aiwar
#| tbl-cap-location: top
#| tbl-cap-align: left
#| tbl-cap: "AI War Cloud Database: A collection of techno-military-industrial projects that use machine learning tasks."
#| tbl-colwidths: [30,10,30,125,125,125,125,75]
#| class: cell

from IPython.display import display, HTML, Markdown
# from itables import show
from tabulate import tabulate
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv('data/aiwarcloud-table.csv', sep=',')

dfDisp = df.drop(['Source', 'URL', 'Reference', 'Link'], axis=1)    

md_table = dfDisp.head(43).to_markdown(
        index=False, 
        headers="keys", 
        )

# display(Markdown(md_table))
display(dfDisp.head(43))
``` -->




<!--{.cell}-->
<!-- ::: {.column-page}  -->

<!-- ```{python}
#| echo: false
#| column: page
#| label: tbl-aiwar
#| tbl-cap-location: top
#| tbl-cap-align: left
#| tbl-cap: "AI War Cloud Database: A collection of techno-military-industrial projects that use machine learning tasks."
#| tbl-colwidths: [30,10,30,125,125,125,125,75]
#| class: cell

from IPython.display import display, HTML, Markdown
# from itables import show
from tabulate import tabulate
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv('data/aiwarcloud-table.csv', sep=',')

dfDisp = df.drop(['Source', 'URL', 'Reference', 'Link'], axis=1)    

md_table = dfDisp.head(43).to_markdown(
        index=False, 
        headers="keys", 
        )

# display(Markdown(md_table))
display(dfDisp.head(43))
``` -->
